steps.t: Thrymm, Cyneberg, and Gárwig are prepared to defeat Núrzum. Speak with Thrymm along the ice bridge.
The giant Núrzum is heading to Forlaw in an attempt to extinguish the last bastion of hope for the people of Wildermore. Run towards Núrzum until you'…
Núrzum has been defeated. The people of Wildermore will be terrorized no longer. Speak with Thrymm.
